# Federico Baravalle

> Technical Program Manager in Physical AI and Robotics, and Senior Mechanical Engineer with 6+ years in electromechanical systems. Has delivered projects up to $10M+ in scope with VP-level reporting and covered 8 of 10 engineering systems life cycle phases. Italian-Argentinian, relocating to Atlanta, GA, with no US visa sponsorship required.

## Profile

- Name: Federico Baravalle
- Role: TPM in Physical AI & Robotics / Senior Mechanical Engineer
- Experience: 6+ years in electromechanical systems
- Scope: Programs up to $10M+ with VP-level reporting
- Lifecycle coverage: 8 of 10 engineering systems life cycle phases
- Location: Italian-Argentinian, relocating to Atlanta, GA
- Work authorization: No US visa sponsorship required

## Experience

- MIXOT (2025–2026) — Founder. Industrial automation.
- Alstom (2023–2025) — Rail / urban transit systems.
- Thermo Fisher Scientific (2021–2022) — Advanced manufacturing / lab instruments.
- Tenaris (2018–2020) — Oil & gas / premium connections.

## Founder experience

As founder of MIXOT, Federico conducted 60+ customer discovery interviews across European metalworking SMBs, built an 84-task automation feasibility framework, and qualified a €0.7M pilot customer.
